notes: Cross-arcana world-state ambient injectors. Read by TarotGauntletGame at run start; when the relevant SaveSystem key is unlocked, the listed ambient_lines are appended to the run's ambient pool, and the listed gravity_extras are shuffled into the gravity deck. Lets one arcana's events haunt every future arcana's runs without rewriting per-arcana data.

states.label: THE SINKHOLE IS OPEN
states.description: Triggered by losing BLOW OUT THE CANDLES with the_steamboat_sails finale. The river has taken the bank and the sinkhole has formed. The town has not been the same since.
ambient_lines: somebody's talking on the bank about the sinkhole. they don't agree.
the river is finding ways into rooms that used to be dry.
the cathedral is dark on the other side of town.
the air tastes like a thing that has gone under water and come back up.
the cicadas pause when they reach the part of the song the sinkhole is in.
somebody from the next town up the river is asking where the bank went.
the radio mentions the sinkhole and then doesn't again.

gravity_extras.title: the sinkhole widens
gravity_extras.flavor: somebody calls in to say a small piece of bank gave way an hour ago.

gravity_extras.title: the sinkhole settles
gravity_extras.flavor: for once tonight the town isn't talking about it.

states.label: THE FIRST SEVEN ARE DONE
states.description: Triggered by winning a scenario in each of the first seven arcanas. The town has been touched by every keeper.
ambient_lines: the room has a steadier shape tonight. you can feel the other rooms holding it up.
somebody on the radio mentions cora's bus and elicia's booth in the same sentence.
the bus kid waves up at the apartment window. somebody waves back.
frasier's lamp is on in the cathedral. you can see it through the window.

states.label: THE CANDLES HAVE BEEN LIT
states.description: Triggered by lighting the candles in BLOW OUT THE CANDLES. A small bright moment everyone remembers.
ambient_lines: the candles got lit. that was a different night.
frasier still looks at the workbench differently.

states.label: THE CONVERSATION HAPPENED
states.description: Triggered by locking Ep. 17 of Pomegranate Hour. The Two-Chairs Women began speaking. The show is being made.
ambient_lines: somebody on the bank says they heard elicia is finishing the show. they may be wrong. they may also not be wrong.
the eighty-six-minute soundstage block, finally used. the receipt is no longer in the desk.
marisol calls her agent and says she has a thing she wants to clear three weekends for.
hen, in LA, opens a document for the first time in nine years.
the suite hums one notch louder. somebody is awake in it.

gravity_extras.title: a phone call about the show
gravity_extras.flavor: your phone rings. an area code you don't recognize. someone heard about the conversation episode.

states.label: THE BROOD IS BACK
states.description: Triggered by sitting with the Entomologist in THE LONG EDIT. The seventeen-year cicada brood is emerging this season. The woods upstate are loud the way they were in '96.
ambient_lines: the cicadas are loud tonight in a way they have been loud only once before.
somebody on the radio is asking if anyone has driven upstate this week.
the brood emerges in patches. tonight is one of the patches.
davey would have been forty-eight this year. you do the math without meaning to.
the suite's modem rack is humming at a slightly different pitch. it has noticed.

gravity_extras.title: a cicada lands on the window
gravity_extras.flavor: one lands on the outside of the window and clings. it is brown and translucent and twenty centimeters away from your face.

gravity_extras.title: the brood hums underneath
gravity_extras.flavor: the cicadas outside the room rise in pitch together, then settle. they are doing a thing they only do tonight.

states.label: THE APARTMENT HELD
states.description: Triggered by completing all three Lovers scenarios. The apartment above the diner is in the right shape — Reed's painting finished, the boxes resolved, the conversation that was supposed to happen finally having happened.
ambient_lines: the apartment above john's diner has its window cracked tonight. january air through february.
somebody walking past on the street looks up. the light is on.
the diner sends up coffee for two on a tray every afternoon at 4 pm.
reed's painting hangs over the bed corner now. the quarter-inch of red landed.

states.label: THE ROUTE RUNS
states.description: Triggered by completing all three Chariot scenarios. Cora's route runs reliably even on the nights she's not driving. The bus knows the road.
ambient_lines: the midnight bus passes on the road north. you can hear it if you listen.
channel 17 has a voice on it that sounds like cora's but isn't.
the sunoco at mile 14 stays open later than it used to.
somebody on the radio mentions a passenger who left a paperback on seat b-3 once.
